sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Aviation (Amendment) [No. 2 of 2012 3
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 2 of 2012
Date of Assent:12th April, 2012
An Act to amend the Aviation Act.
[16th April, 2012
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
1. This Act may be cited as the Aviation (Amendment) Act, Short title
2012, and shall be read as one with the Aviation Act, in this Act Cap. 444
referred to as the principal Act.
2. Section twenty-four of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
of
deletion of the definition of “designated airport” and the substitution
section 24
therefor of the following:
“designated airport” means Kenneth Kaunda International
Airport at Lusaka, Harry Mwaanga Nkumbula International
Airport at Livingstone, Simon Mwansa Kapwepwe
International Airport at Ndola, Mfuwe Airport and any other
airport which the Minister may designate by statutory
instrument;.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1,000
4
